seoTitle: Craven vs Crawford River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Craven and Crawford River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Craven vs Crawford River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Craven and Crawford River.
heading: Craven vs Crawford River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Craven, New South Wales and Crawford River, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crawford River has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Craven (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Craven or Crawford River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Craven has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Crawford River scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Craven scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Crawford River scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Craven or Crawford River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crawford River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
